reviews.review_title: Why can’t I join a lobby
reviews.review_description: Still 5/5

I’ve made a WHOLE bunch of friends on this game. btw my name is Luis, and I love the long arms and Slightly speed boost, I also love the kindness of the fellow Players. Except some of em… but i love this game, spent over 1,000 calories and it’s very competitive for really good players 👍 love the Moderators and yeah!! keep up the good work system!!!!!😇😇😇😇

I love this game. The reason is being that the games lobby’s work and it’s has a great community! There are no accusations in the game and is filled with competitive players. So I was willing to request for mod.
I was talking to my cousin in real life and I cursed at my cousin and he banned me for 48 hours! And I told him that I wasn’t talking to any of the gorillas and he still banned me

Ok it's a great game for competitive people to play in that's the 5 stars but I took one away because the owner named system is banning people who do nothing  to harm or make anyone feel bad or uncomfortable so stop with the unnecessary bans please





































System please unban me bro
So I was scrolling on TikTok then I seen. Vid and the game is really good
The owner banned people for no reason and I met him in a lobby and he told me to hang myself and he is a crybaby
When i get ln the game says “check your connection than restart your game” i tried disconected my wifi,deleted and redownloaded the game,restarted my vr and still cant play can someone help me?

Hey I saw your game across tiktok and I thought it looked really cool and hands down this is my top 3 fav gtag game

Can I pls have moderator if not it's fine but I would be really happy
THE OWNER BANNED ME FOR NO REASON THATS WHY THIS GAME IS BAD, BANNING PEOPLE FOR NO REASON ,THATS RETARDED  THE OWNER SUCKS GO GET A JOB,UNLIKE ME I HAVE A JOB,MY JOB IS WORKING AT LA,ROSES.

It has long arms and speed boost its really fun to have a good time with friends or random people I also like the purple lava monkey I learned how to Lucio really good in this game dont forget the 1,000,000 shiny roxx and the old updates are in this game so we can have og cosmetics👍. We don't have to deal with bad revamps so thank you for reading and give this game a 5 star 🌟
I really love the long arms and there’s a lot of nice people out there and I like the speed boost as well.￼
best gtag fan game I have ever played good moderation team nice people I had a fun time playing this game you should get it
I recommend this game for anyone who likes gorilla tag, the game gives you auto long arms and a really fast auto speed boost, and you can vert really good!, and also it's in Xmas 2022
System (the owner) banned me for asking for a kiss as a joke my ninja is tweakin the mods will ban u over the smallest thing don’t play this💀
These mods are Karen’s and game should lowkey be taken down cs it’s a copy
I love it
hey i really like this game and its not better thsn most games but i would say thst is pretty good tbh
